overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a burning forest at blue hour. The character approaches and navigates around burning wreckage and wooden siege structures while warm firelight contrasts against the cool dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with distant fire glow

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily uphill through grassy forest toward the distant fire on the horizon

entered.detail: Leafless trees silhouetted against the dark blue dusk sky
Green grass covering the forest floor
Narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
Orange firelight illuminating the horizon through the trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open forest clearing at dusk, with bare trees silhouetted against the blue hour sky. The grass-covered ground gives way to a dirt path leading toward a distant fire glowing orange through the trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: burning battlefield wreckage with wooden siege tower

events.description: character reaches the burning wreckage and wooden siege structures
firelight becomes dominant as character walks between burning piles, casting strong orange glow

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating around the burning debris and wooden siege tower, examining the destruction

entered.detail: Tall wooden siege tower framework partially engulfed in flames
Piles of burning debris and wooden carts emitting thick smoke
Wooden bridge or walkway structure on fire

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a burning battlefield where Geralt walks among flaming wreckage. A large wooden siege tower stands engulfed in flames to the left while burning carts and debris line the path. The lighting shifts dramatically to warm firelight as the character navigates around the destruction.

events.description: character moves away from the main burning wreckage into darker forest areas
distant burning hut becomes visible ahead as a new light source

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking away from the siege tower through darker forest toward a distant burning building

entered.detail: Small thatched-roof building burning in the distance
Low stone walls or ruins alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the intense firelight behind, Geralt enters a darker section of forest where the blue dusk dominates. Stone walls appear along the left side of the path as he approaches a new fire source - a burning hut visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: firelight from the burning hut illuminates the path and character with warm orange light

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the burning cottage, moving closer to the intense flames and smoke

entered.detail: Small wooden cottage with thatched roof engulfed in intense flames
Wooden cart or wagon near the burning building

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the burning thatched-roof cottage as the firelight intensifies and illuminates the surrounding area. A wooden cart sits near the structure as flames consume the building. The stone walls now appear on the right as the path curves toward the intense blaze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a twilight forest that transforms from a quiet, blue-hued clearing into a series of chaotic, fire-lit ruins. It begins with Geralt walking across a grassy clearing under a deep blue sky, following a dirt path toward a distant orange glow. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a burning battlefield where the lighting turns warm and intense, moving past a flaming wooden siege tower and scattered wreckage. The environment then transitions back into the cool shadows of the forest beside stone walls, before the path curves toward a final, intensifying blaze. The shot concludes as the camera approaches a burning thatched-roof cottage and a nearby wooden cart, with the firelight once again dominating the surrounding darkness.
